controls.title: Controls
controls.content:
Move with WASD.
Press E to interact with objects.
Left click to attack.
Right click to rotate the camera.
Press Shift to dash.
Press B to open the backpack.
Press Tab to open the guide.

gamegoal.title: Goal
gamegoal.content:
Survive the enemy waves, defeat the boss, and finish a run.
Collect words to strengthen and reshape your attacks.

pickup.title: Word Pickups
pickup.content:
Defeated enemies drop words.
Move close to pick them up, then use them to build your current weapon.

bullettoken.title: BulletToken Build
bullettoken.content:
Your current attack is made from multiple word slots.
Different words decide the attack's element, pattern, and count.
When the combination changes, your combat style changes immediately.

tokenclass.title: Token Types
tokenclass.content:
Behavior: decides the attack pattern, such as Straight or Spread.
Core: decides the element, such as Fire, Ice, Thunder, or Edge.
Result: decides the impact effect, such as Direct or Explosion.
Value: decides count or strength, such as 2, 3, or 5.

buildtips.title: Build Tips
buildtips.content:
Pick up words first, then enter the build screen.
Try different combinations and find a style that fits the current fight.
There is no single perfect build; adaptation matters.

versionnote.title: Current Version
versionnote.content:
This is a prototype / MVP version.
Some tuning, art, and systems are still being adjusted.
